resources.string: T톝mpi퍔r톝ci톝r %1$.1f춿%2$s c톝 w칛 piny 톝 w칛 k칛 %3$.1f춿%2$s
Gua퍔thni퍔 diaal tin ca g톖퍔r piny
K칛p data ni퍔 tin caa ka퍔m raar
Warning: 쿯n Enangling min ca lat nhial der톝 b톝tteri퍔du woc k톝 p톝팯th mi퍔 l칛ny ni퍔 min la tu톖톖k
Wi퍔g톝n Bagr톖톖n mi퍔 Di퍔i퍔t mi퍔 c톖ali퍔 Pakt톝r
K칛 tin g칬rk톝: K칛 Courstent URL
K칛tht톖m URL /c톝 te thi퍔n, ki톝 /thi톝l톝 j톝 lu톖t. Ji퍔n deri w칛 r톝y l칛tni k톝 톢칬칬 bi URL min ca rialik칛 mat thi퍔n
쿯n ri톝k mi퍔 ci퍔 tu톖톖k mi퍔 caa 톢톖퍔n i퍔 ba la퍔t k톝 톢칬칬 ba la퍔td톝 ny톖k k톝 l칛tni퍔
Cu톝 pa퍔k k톝 mat %1$s data k톝n톝 %2$s data
Mi ci thi톝l lu톖t k톝 l칛th data ni퍔 tin ca lar i퍔 ba lar
Cu톝 pa퍔k k톝 l칛thd톝 l칛t 톝 g톖aa k톝 data ni퍔 톢톖aa k칛 th칛rb칛du, 톝 lotd톝 ni퍔 %1$s data
G톖퍔ri URL k칛 gua퍔th tin l칛tdi.txt
Forecast \'%1$s\' 톝 mi ci ji칛k, guic ca퍔p in ca la퍔th l칛t k칛 ny톖k k톝 톢톖퍔n
Forecast du콂 UUL /c톝 r톖 lot, th칢m edits.txt k톝 g칢r
쿲칛n b칛 Fix I k톝n톝 Try kul톝 la퍔t
쿯n app 톝m톝 caa j톝 ny톖k k톝 l칛tni퍔 du콂d톝 톢칬칬 톝n server min ci퍔 r톖 mat k톝 j톝 /c톝 Inigo Plugin ny톖k k톝 l칛tni퍔 k톝 waeWX. Fields d톖퍔콂 /c톝 bi퍔 nyoth 톝 g톖aa am칛ni mi퍔 ci퍔 eneWX r톖 ny톖k k톝 l칛tni퍔
Updatate b톝th b톝l 톝 mi퍔 /thi톝l lu톖t, update th톝tti콂ni퍔 k칛 k톝 k톖r톝 ba ny톖k k톝 th칢m
K칛 %1$s 톝nt칛칛m톝 go퍔o퍔r톝 %2$s data pai퍔l k칛 %3$s th칛rb칛, bi퍔 %4$s ny톖k k톝 l칛tni퍔 k칛 bi퍔 %5$s pai퍔l ny톖k k톝 l칛th l칛t 톝 콂ot app 톝m톝 /ken톝 ni퍔 l칛t 톝 g톖aa. C톖l Ok k톝 kui퍔 ruaacni퍔 ti퍔 콂uan k칛 %6$s
Manual up state set, swape refresh screen min ca la퍔th
T톝mpi퍔r톝ci톝r %1$.1f춿%2$s c톝 r톖 ji톝c 톝 w칛 k칛 %3$.1f춿%2$s
K칛 tin bi ben k톝 k톖r k칛 tin b칢칢?
Thi톝l톝 mi ca ka퍔m raar ki톝 app mi /ka퍔n la퍔th l칛t
Notificationni퍔 g칬rk톝 톢칬칬 ba ji퍔 la퍔r l칛r mi퍔 ci퍔 l칢th, nhiaal ki톝 nhiaal cop k칛 min ca la퍔th piny
Ni퍔 m칢칢 ci퍔 ji퍔n nh톖k ni퍔 톢칬칬 ba ji퍔 la퍔r l칛r lo퍔k ni퍔 k칛 r톝톝w, go퍔o퍔ri 톢칬칬 bi톝 la퍔th l칛t r톝y th톝tni퍔 ni퍔 톢칬칬, launch th톝tni퍔?
쿲칛n g칬칬r칛 톢칬칬 b칛 콂ot k톝 mi퍔 guic n톝y URL min ci퍔 ji퍔 la퍔r l칛r
/C톝 r톖 moc k톝 톢칬칬 b톝 thur톝 radar
Radard type \'%1$s\' 톝 mi퍔 /ci퍔 p칛칛r, guic th톝tti콂ni퍔ku k톝 file k칛 톢톖퍔n톝 ny톖k
Radard URL /c톝 te thi퍔n. Ji퍔n deri j톝 la퍔th l칛t k톝 톢칬칬 bi톝 g톝r
La퍔td톝 ni퍔 ciaa콂 mi퍔 ci퍔 nhiaal cop gua퍔a퍔th in ca la퍔th thi퍔n
K칛 nhiaal mi퍔 ci퍔 tu톖톖k %1$.2f%2$s cu톝 pa퍔a퍔r k톝 pekdu min la %3$.2f%2$s
K칛 %1$.1f%2$s cu톝 pa퍔a퍔r k톝 pekdu min %3$.1f%2$s
Rainrate du콂 %1$.2fin r톝y %2$d %3$s min j톖ak cu톝 cop k칛 \'Thi톝r\' l톝bel
Rainr톝t du콂 %1$.2fin r톝y %2$d %3$s min j톖ak cu톝 cop k칛 \'Warni콂\' l톝bel
Rainrate du콂 %1$.2fin r톝y %2$d min j톖ak %3$s cu톝 cop k칛 \'Watch\' l톝bel
Rainrate du콂 %1$.1fmm r톝y %2$d %3$s min j톖ak cu톝 cop k칛 \'Thi톝r\' l톝bel
Rainr톝t du콂 %1$.1fmm r톝y %2$d %3$s min j톖ak cu톝 \'Warni콂\' l톝bel cop
Rainr톝t du콂 %1$.1fmm r톝y %2$d %3$s min j톖ak cu톝 cop k칛 \'Watch\' l톝bel
Alerts mi퍔 ci퍔 nhiaal w칛 nhial k칛 pek in di퍔i퍔t min ca 콂un k톝 pek nhiaal
Alerts mi퍔 ci퍔 nhiaal w칛 nhial mi퍔 ca lar i퍔 ba la퍔r l칛r k톝 gua퍔a퍔th in ci퍔 nhiaal thu톖퍔k
Alerts mi ci nhiaal w칛 nhial k칛 watch limit min tek칛 gua퍔th in ci nhiaal thu톖퍔k
K칛 ji퍔n go퍔o퍔ri 톢칬칬 bi data ni퍔 diaal woc?
k칛 ta퍔a퍔 in l칛t k톝 naath
K칛 콂otd톝 tek톝 data mi ca lar 콂otd톝
Alerts 톝 w칛 k칛 r톝톝w k톝 c칛콂 k톝l mi ci l칢thd톝 cop k칛 pek in ca lar
K칛mni j톝 raar k톝 tet k톝 톢칬칬 ba manual ny톖k k톝 l칛tni퍔, du콂ni퍔 톢칬칬 /thi톝l톝 mi퍔 ca la퍔th r톝yd톝 mi퍔 c톖ali퍔
URL cua la퍔th k칛 depu톖lt ki톝 cu톝 te baa콂
La퍔td톝 k톝 gua퍔a퍔th mi퍔 pay tu톖톖k
/C톝 r톖 lu칛콂 k톝 mat ki톝 ba ka퍔m raar k칛 URL 칢칢 ca la퍔th l칛t
/C톝 lu칛콂 k톝 mat ki톝 b톝 min ca g톖퍔r piny kul톝 ka퍔m raar
/Ka퍔n j톝 lu칛콂 k톝 r칬m ki톝 ka퍔m raar %1$s k칛 %2$s
/C톝 r톖 lu칛콂 k톝 mat ki톝 deri radar= thur톝 min b칛 k칛 int톝rn톝t
/C톝 r톖 lu칛콂 k톝 mat ki톝 deri j톝 mat k칛 serverdu
/C톝 r톖 lu칛콂 k톝 mat ki톝 deri thur톝 min ca g톖퍔r k칛 webcam ka퍔m raar k칛 th칛rberdu
/Ka퍔n j톝 lu칛콂 k톝 ka퍔m raar k칛 %1$s k톝 톢칬칬 톝n URL c톝 ba콂
Gua퍔th in ba W톝bkaam ny톖k k톝 l칛tni퍔
Thur톝 min ca la퍔t 톝 Webma 콂otd톝 la j톝 laa ka퍔mk톝 raar
Webma URL /c톝 te thi퍔n ki톝 톝 mi퍔 /thi톝l lu톖t
Der톝 j톝 ny톖k k톝 l칛tni퍔 du콂d톝 톢칬칬 WiFi der톝 r톖 ny톖k k톝 l칛tni퍔
쿯n w칛칛r 톝m톖 톝 j톝n I퍔thtati퍔thtikni퍔 I퍔thtati퍔thtikni퍔
